vids.description: Gab Marcotti and Julien Laurens discuss Arsenal's striker struggles and make suggestions for who could replace Mikel Merino.
vids.title: Marcotti suggests Arsenal start teenage 'phenom' over Merino up-front
vids.headline: Marcotti suggests Arsenal start teenage 'phenom' over Merino up-front

vids.description: Shaka Hislop believes that Mikel Arteta should start midfielder Mikel Merino up front for Arsenal due to a lack of fit strikers.
vids.title: Should Mikel Arteta start Mikel Merino as a striker?
vids.headline: Should Mikel Arteta start Mikel Merino as a striker?

vids.description: Janusz Michallik questions whether Mikel Merino can solve Arsenal's striker problem after scoring twice as a substitute vs. Leicester.
vids.title: Is Mikel Merino the answer to Arsenal's striker struggles?
vids.headline: Is Mikel Merino the answer to Arsenal's striker struggles?
